traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Fiendish Legacy
traits.description: Choose a legacy that grants supernatural abilities and spells at levels 1, 3, and 5. Spells are always prepared; each can be cast once without a spell slot (regained on Long Rest) and using any spell slots you have. Spellcasting ability: INT, WIS, or CHA (chosen at legacy selection).

traits.name: Otherworldly Presence
traits.description: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. When you cast it with this trait, it uses the same spellcasting ability as your Fiendish Legacy.
